narrative:
Fairborn 203 (precinct in Greene County) has 510 registered voters, with 57.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.4%, a modest Republican lean of 5.7 percentage points.
